plan_under_test: Ignore preliminary mark-scheme notes and specific marking principles pages when detecting legacy mark-scheme question anchors.
expected_initial_failure: At least one notes-focused test should fail before implementation because numbered notes can be treated as answer anchors.
what_passing_proves: Notes-only pages and specific marking principles pages do not become legacy question anchors.
Numbered notes before a same-page table header are ignored while real answer rows remain detectable.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove every possible mark-scheme front-matter title is covered.
It does not prove following-page next-question contamination is fixed.
risk_of_bad_tests: The marker list could be too narrow or too broad; tests cover representative front matter and a same-page real-table guard.

new_tests.purpose: Prevents Mark Scheme Notes numbered paragraphs from becoming question anchors.
Prevents Specific Marking Principles content from becoming question anchors.
Keeps numbered front matter above a real answer table from polluting the first answer block.

success_criteria: Existing legacy mark-scheme anchor tests still pass.
